The Starfox is a foxy vendor found inside the server spawn. Items within Starfox are bought with [seasonal currency](../items/starshards.md).
However, starfox can also be accessed anywhere using /starfox
## Inventory Changes

The Starfox's inventory periodically changes with new updates. Below are listed changes of the Starfox's inventory.
Starfox used to change every season, but was randomly changed to bi-monthly (every 2 months).


## Year: 2024

### Demon's Den update

The Demon's Den update did not change the Starfox's inventory, however, it technically is the start since the rebrand.

Within this starfox was the following items;

Armor: 
Starfox Armor, this armor had two traits that are swapable between by holding shift.
Mythic Name 1: Stellar Shields
Mythic Trait 1: You gain permanent Resistance I and take 10% less damage from mobs.
Mythic Name 2: Stellar Daggers
Mythic Trait 2: You gain permanent Strength I and deal 10% more damage to mobs.

Sanguine Armor, this armor only had one trait;
Upon killing a mob, you will gain Strength I and Invisibility I. Fighting a player has a chance to give you Regeneration I for 20s.

Weapons & Tools:
This starfox didn't have any tools, but it did come with a sword;
Sword: The Twisted Blade, both enchanted and has a trait;
Enchants: Sharpness IV, Sweeping Edge II, Looting II
Mythic Name: Bloody Metal Mythic Trait
Mythic Trait: When you kill a mob it has a chance to drop redstone dust. It will also have a 15% to receive a damage boost.
